title: Resonance Solstice
subTitle: Role Playing/MMORPG
desc:
Dear Conductor, we finally meet. Pre-register now to unlock 10 Laplace Recruit, Trainee Uniform and Exclusive Crew. All aboard for an eternal journey!
Resonance Solstice is a train simulation RPG that combines with a unique real-time trading system. As a conductor for COLUMBA, you’ll drive your train across the continent, reconnecting cities and regions to save a world on the brink of collapse.
In this world full of unknowns, you'll meet companions from different factions, each with unique personalities, and together you'll face the adventures and challenges that come your way during your journey.
◆ Game Introduction
- [Rebuild Wasteland World] Take control of the Eternal and restore post-disaster trade routes! Connect a world in chaos through the power of railways!
- [Train Simulation & Management] Freely customize your train—produce, trade, entertain. It’s your train, and your rules!
- [Cross-City Real-Time Trading] Buy low, sell high with real-time trading across cities! Climb your way to becoming the world’s top merchant!
- [Real-Time Card Battles] Strategize with flexible team builds and thousands of skill combinations! Engage in real-time card battles to protect your convoys and trade routes!
- [Immersive Anime Experience] Interact with fully animated Live2D characters, featuring top-tier voice acting! Dive into a cinematic, anime-style adventure!
Voice Actor Cast:
Kitō Akari, Mizuki Nana, Kugimiya Rie, Tomatsu Haruka, Sugita Tomokazu, Ishida Akira, Morikawa Toshiyuki, Matsuoka Yoshitsugu, Uchiyama Kōki, Ōnishi Saori, Murase Ayumu, Enoki Junya, Toyoguchi Megumi, Honda Mariko, Kanemoto Hisako, Tamura Yukari, Maeda Kaori, Uchida Aya, Ise Mariya, Kuroki Honoka, Numakura Manami, Nakahara Mai, Senbongi Sayaka, Yumiri Hanamori, Taketatsu Ayana, Kohara Konomi, Yukana, Maria Naganawa, Sonozaki Mie, Asumi Kana, M・A・O, Machico, Tachibana Mirai, Itō Shizuka, Tadokoro Azusa, Itō Miku, Mamiya Tomoaki
◆World Settings
When the unknown object "Morphic Moon" appeared in the sky, everything we once knew changed. The world was thrown into disarray, with conflicting factions and chaos spreading through every corner of the cities. In Resonance, humanity succumbed to slumber, transmuting into dream-drunk entities beyond mortal recognition.
In this remade reality,‌ as a Conductor of COLUMBA,‌ where shall you steer your Train —‌ the lifeline threading between Bonfire Cities' final hopes?
